title: Wheelchairs/Wheeled Mobility - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Wheelchairs/Wheeled Mobility 5 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CLEARVIEW DISABILITY RESOURCE CENTER MEDICAL EQUIPMENT LOANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides gently used medical equipment, such as walkers, canes, wheelchairs, bath seats and more. Accepts donations of clean and functional equipment. Does not accept items such as lift chairs, knee or back braces, orthopedic boots, medical beds, CPAP's or nebulizers. 1114 SW Frazer Avenue Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 276-1130 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HASL CENTER FOR INDEPENDENT LIVING DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT LOANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Loans wheelchairs, walkers, canes, crutches, bath aids, and other items to people in need of assistive technology. 305 NE E Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 9am-3pm, Wednesday 9am-noon and 1pm-3pm Email (541) 479-4275 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON FAMILY TO FAMILY HEALTH INFORMATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a call-in center for family members of children and youth with special needs and chronic health conditions (developmental and emotional disabilities, behavioral problems, and chronic physical illnesses) and professionals who serve them. The center specializes in providing information and resources related to health information, health care access, and special needs systems and supports. All calls are confidential. Families may also request to be placed on an email list to receive monthly correspondence about issues of importance to children and youth with special needs in Oregon. 707 SW Gaines Street Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Family members of individuals age 26 and younger with special physical, emotional, behavioral, or mental health needs, including those who are at risk or suspected of having a special need. The child/youth does not have to have a diagnosed condition. Does not require documentation to prove citizenship to receive services. Hours: Message line available 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (833) 990-9930 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ROTARY CLUB OF PORTLAND WHEELS OF POWER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides electric wheelchairs and scooters. PO Box 28106 Portland, OR 97228 Eligibility: -Immobilized individuals who cannot use manual wheelchairs -A need for financial assistance -Insurance does not cover the expense -Home must be wheelchair accessible with no barriers Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 228-1542 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST JOHN'S MEDICAL LOAN CLOSET MEDICAL EQUIPMENT LOANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Lends durable medical equipment on a short-term basis, typically no longer than 3 months. Inventory includes wheelchairs, walkers, knee scooters, crutches, canes, toilet risers and commodes, shower stools, and transfer benches. Accepts donations of similar durable medical equipment. 795 Franklin Avenue SW Bandon, OR 97411 Eligibility: Unrestricted, but focus is on serving individuals recovering from surgery or an accident, those in hospice care, and those waiting for purchase authorization from their insurance carrier Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 590-2443 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CLEARVIEW DISABILITY RESOURCE CENTER MEDICAL EQUIPMENT LOANS HASL CENTER FOR INDEPENDENT LIVING DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT LOANS OREGON FAMILY TO FAMILY HEALTH INFORMATION CENTER OREGON FAMILY TO FAMILY HEALTH INFORMATION CENTER ROTARY CLUB OF PORTLAND WHEELS OF POWER ST JOHN'S MEDICAL LOAN CLOSET MEDICAL EQUIPMENT LOANS
